Enfado City
Visual Chaos . Cinematic Precision
  • We are a full-service media production house turning raw energy and street culture into high-end cinematic art. From music videos and underground lifestyle docs to striking commercials and precision VFX—we break the traditional mold to engineer stories that resonate and disrupt.

Lights, Camera, Action

About Me

My Vision

 

Uncompromising quality. Unfiltered creativity. My vision is built on a solid six-year foundation of directing, cutting-edge video editing, and complex VFX workflow. Enfado was created to give brands and artists a powerful, distinct visual voice. By mastering everything from the initial treatment and on-set direction to the final 3D animation, I ensure a seamless, high-octane production process that doesn't just meet expectations—it completely shatters them.

Our Services

Creative Direction & Directing

From Concept to Screen

  • We don't just point a camera; we construct worlds. From the initial treatment and cinematic storyboarding to on-set direction, we shape raw ideas into high-impact visual narratives. Whether it's an underground music video or a high-end brand campaign, we ensure every frame carries a distinct identity.

Advanced VFX & 3D Motion

Bending Reality

  • Elevating stories through cutting-edge digital craftsmanship. Specializing in complex VFX integration, precise 3D modeling, and high-octane motion design. We manipulate reality in post-production to create mind-bending simulation and surreal environments that captivate audiences and refuse to be ignored.

Post-Production & Editing

Commercial Production

  • Where the real magic happens. We deliver elite video editing with dynamic pacing, seamless sound design cues, and cinematic color grading. Every cut is calculated to trigger an emotional response, maintaining absolute control over the visual rhythm and ensuring the final export shatters expectations.
